Entries.Name: GPU Scheduling
Entries.Detail: Hardware-accelerated GPU scheduling lets the GPU manage its own video memory directly, potentially reducing input latency in games.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Hardware-accelerated GPU scheduling lets the GPU manage its own video memory directly, potentially reducing input latency in games.

Entries.Name: Xbox Game Bar
Entries.Detail: The Xbox Game Bar is an in-game overlay (Win+G) for screenshots, video recording, and system performance monitoring.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: The Xbox Game Bar is an in-game overlay (Win+G) for screenshots, video recording, and system performance monitoring.

Entries.Name: Xbox Game Bar Tips
Entries.Detail: Shows onboarding tips and hints inside the Xbox Game Bar overlay. Disable if you are already familiar with Game Bar.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Xbox Game Bar tips are enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Shows onboarding tips and hints inside the Xbox Game Bar overlay. Disable if you are already familiar with Game Bar.

Entries.Name: Fullscreen Optimizations
Entries.Detail: A Windows feature that optimizes games and apps running in fullscreen mode for better performance. Disabling can fix compatibility issues in some older games.
Entries.CautionReason: Disabling Fullscreen Optimizations may reduce gaming performance in some applications. Use only for troubleshooting.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: A Windows feature that optimizes games and apps running in fullscreen mode for better performance. Disabling can fix compatibility issues in some older games. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.

Entries.Name: Multiplane Overlay
Entries.Detail: A GPU compositing feature that can improve performance. Disabling can fix visual glitches or flickering in some display configurations.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: A GPU compositing feature that can improve performance. Disabling can fix visual glitches or flickering in some display configurations.
